'''鈭歬-y-p''' ('''kakayap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mylonitise|mylonitise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-y-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mylonitise|mylonitise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-y-p
|-
! Lemma
| kakayap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikayap|thikayap]] || [[word:jikayap|jikayap]] || [[word:shikayap|shikayap]] || [[word:kikayap|kikayap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukayap|thuthukayap]] || [[word:jujukayap|jujukayap]] || [[word:shushukayap|shushukayap]] || [[word:kukukayap|kukukayap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukayap|thukayap]] || [[word:jukayap|jukayap]] || [[word:shukayap|shukayap]] || [[word:kukayap|kukayap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukayap|thukayap]] || [[word:jukayap|jukayap]] || [[word:shukayap|shukayap]] || [[word:kukayap|kukayap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekayap|thekayap]] || [[word:jekayap|jekayap]] || [[word:shekayap|shekayap]] || [[word:kekayap|kekayap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokayap|thothokayap]] || [[word:jojokayap|jojokayap]] || [[word:shoshokayap|shoshokayap]] || [[word:kokokayap|kokokayap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokayap|thokayap]] || [[word:jokayap|jokayap]] || [[word:shokayap|shokayap]] || [[word:kokayap|kokayap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokayap|thokayap]] || [[word:jokayap|jokayap]] || [[word:shokayap|shokayap]] || [[word:kokayap|kokayap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙kayap|th忙kayap]] || [[word:j忙kayap|j忙kayap]] || [[word:sh忙kayap|sh忙kayap]] || [[word:k忙kayap|k忙kayap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakayap|thathakayap]] || [[word:jajakayap|jajakayap]] || [[word:shashakayap|shashakayap]] || [[word:kakakayap|kakakayap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakayap|thakayap]] || [[word:jakayap|jakayap]] || [[word:shakayap|shakayap]] || [[word:kakayap|kakayap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakayap|thakayap]] || [[word:jakayap|jakayap]] || [[word:shakayap|shakayap]] || [[word:kakayap|kakayap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakayap|shakayap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakayap|goshakayap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakayap|gokishakayap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakayapn眉|shakayapn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakayapnkn眉|goshakayapnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakayapn眉|gokishakayapn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakayapsh毛|shakayapsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakayapnksh毛|goshakayapnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakayapsh毛|gokishakayapsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakayapro|shakayapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakayapnkro|goshakayapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakayapro|gokishakayapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakayapmu|shakayapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakayapnkmu|goshakayapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakayapmu|gokishakayapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakayapsher|shakayapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakayapnksher|goshakayapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakayapsher|gokishakayapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakayapng|shakayapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakayapnkng|goshakayapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakayapng|gokishakayapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakayapya|shakayapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakayapnkya|goshakayapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakayapya|gokishakayapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakayapyam|shakayapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakayapnkyam|goshakayapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakayapyam|gokishakayapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakayapn眉sh毛|shakayapn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakayapnkn眉sh毛|goshakayapnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakayapn眉sh毛|gokishakayapn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakayapn眉ro|shakayapn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakayapnkn眉ro|goshakayapnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakayapn眉ro|gokishakayapn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakayapn眉mu|shakayapn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakayapnkn眉mu|goshakayapnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakayapn眉mu|gokishakayapn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakayapsh毛n眉|shakayapsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakayapnksh毛n眉|goshakayapnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakayapsh毛n眉|gokishakayapsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakayapsh毛ro|shakayapsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakayapnksh毛ro|goshakayapnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakayapsh毛ro|gokishakayapsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakayapsh毛mu|shakayapsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakayapnksh毛mu|goshakayapnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakayapsh毛mu|gokishakayapsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakayapron眉|shakayapron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakayapnkron眉|goshakayapnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakayapron眉|gokishakayapron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakayaprosh毛|shakayaprosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakayapnkrosh毛|goshakayapnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakayaprosh毛|gokishakayaprosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakayapromu|shakayapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakayapnkromu|goshakayapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakayapromu|gokishakayapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakayapmun眉|shakayapmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakayapnkmun眉|goshakayapnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakayapmun眉|gokishakayapmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakayapmush毛|shakayapmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakayapnkmush毛|goshakayapnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakayapmush毛|gokishakayapmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakayapmuro|shakayapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakayapnkmuro|goshakayapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakayapmuro|gokishakayapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
